---
title: Short CV
toc: false
---

::: {.cv-page}
[Download full CV (PDF)](files/CV.pdf){.hero-button .hero-button-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

## Research Experience

**Postdoctoral Researcher**, Sep. 2023 – present<br>
Department of Physics and Astronomy, Uppsala University, Uppsala, Sweden  
Supervisor: Prof. Peter M. Oppeneer

**Guest Scientist**, Apr. 2022 – Jul. 2022<br>
Peter Grünberg Institut and Institute for Advanced Simulation, Forschungszentrum Jülich, Jülich, Germany  
Group of Prof. Yuriy Mokrousov

## Education

**Ph.D. in Physics**, Aug. 2023<br>
Department of Physics, Pohang University of Science and Technology (POSTECH), Pohang, Republic of Korea  
Thesis: "Generation, Detection, and Application of Orbital Dynamics"  
Supervisor: Prof. Hyun-Woo Lee

**B.S. in Physics**, Feb. 2017<br>
Department of Physics, Hanyang University, Seoul, Republic of Korea  


## Awards & Honors

-  2024\. S-Oil Dissertation of the Year Award (S-OIL Science and Culture Foundation)
-  2023\. Best Paper Award for Graduate Students in the Department of Physics (POSTECH)
-  2023\. B. I. Min Best Condensed Matter Theory Paper Award (POSTECH)
-  2021\. Silver Prize at the 27th Samsung Humantech Paper Award (Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd.)
-  2018\. Best presentation award (poster) at 2018 Korean Physical Society Fall Meeting
-  2018–2023. Global Ph.D. Fellowship (funded by National Research Foundation)
-  2011\. National Science & Technology Scholarship (funded by Korea Student Aid Foundation)
:::
